title: Soundarya's Boutique
description: Currently developing a full-stack e-commerce web application for a traditional saree store using Next.js, React.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, and MongoDB. The project focuses on building a responsive and user-friendly interface with efficient state management and seamless navigation. Features include dynamic product listings, category-based filtering, and integration of Razorpay payment gateway for secure online transactions. Emphasizes clean and modular architecture, scalability, and optimized backend performance.

title: MediVault
description: Designed and developed a secure digital prescription management system implementing two-factor authentication (OTP-based login), role-based access control (doctor, patient, pharmacist), RSA–AES hybrid encryption, digital signatures, and QR-code-based verification to ensure prescription authenticity, confidentiality, and tamper resistance.

title: Toffee Table
description: Currently developing a modern and responsive café website as a personal full-stack project using React.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. The project focuses on clean UI design, mobile responsiveness, and delivering a smooth user experience. Showcases strong full-stack development skills, including front-end layout, styling, and efficient back-end data management.

title: FashionFusion
description: Designed and developed a fully responsive e-commerce website for a fictional fashion brand using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Built entirely without frameworks to demonstrate mastery of core web technologies. Features include product showcase, category layout, and interactive navigation.
